prompt:
Write a short text that obeys ALL of these rules:
1. No word may start with the letter "B".
2. Include the word "velvet" exactly 3 times.
3. Use between 32 and 45 words in total.
4. Include the word "coffee" exactly 3 times.
5. Do not use the word "signal".
6. Do not use any word longer than 8 letters.

Output ONLY the text itself — no preamble, no quotes, no title, no explanation.
